name: IT Carabiniere
events: 11 Jun 1945 Around 1345 FG/11, the escort carrier HMS Khedive (A/Capt. D.H. Magnay, RN) departed Colombo for Trincomalee where she arrived around 1845 FG/12. She was escorted by the destroyer Carbiniere. (1)

3 Jul 1945 Around 1530 FG/3, HMS Colossus (Capt. G.H. Stokes,CB, DSC, RN) departed Colombo for Madras. On leaving harbour some aircraft were flown on during which the Italian destroyer Carbiniere conducted plane guard duties.
The destroyer parted company around 1905 FG/3. (2)
